song.title: In The Secret (College Conference Edition)
song.author: Andy Park
song.lyrics:
[T] I wanna see Your face I wanna know Your heart I wanna walk with You Every day of my life, God
[V1] .G C 1) In the secret in the quiet place, .Em D C In the stillness You are there. .G C In the secret in the quiet hour, . I'll wait only for You, .Em D C 'Cause I want to know You more.
[C] .G D Chorus I want to know You. .Em C I want to hear Your voice. .G D C I want to know You more. .G D I want to touch You. .Em C G I want to see Your face. . D C I want to know You more.
[V2] 2) I am reaching for the highest goal, That I might receive the prize. Pressing onward, Pushing every hindrance aside, Out of my way, 'Cause I want to know You more.
